name: Jelly Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit (200°C) or moderately hot.
2. Grease a jelly roll pan measuring 15x10x1 inch with butter or oil.
3. Line the bottom of the pan with wax paper.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine eggs, baking powder, and salt. Beat for 2 minutes at high speed until light and lemon-colored.
5. Gradually add sugar to the mixture and beat for an additional 3 minutes (the mixture should be thick and very light colored).
6. Reduce the mixer speed to low and add lemon juice, then flour, beating only until moistened.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
8. After baking, carefully turn the cake out onto a clean tea towel that has been previously coated with confectioners sugar. Remove the wax paper from the bottom of the cake.
9. Trim all the crisp edges from the cake.
10. Roll the cake tightly, along with the tea towel and confectioners sugar, leaving it rolled up to cool on a cooling rack for about 10 minutes.
11. Unroll the cake and carefully spread jam or jelly over it.
12. Reroll the cake with the filling inside. Wrap the entire thing in the tea towel to finish cooling.
13. Just before serving, sprinkle confectioners sugar over each serving.
